title: Topology-Aware Workload Scheduling — API configuration: scheduling constraints
text:
Every PodGroup (or PodGroupTemplate) may optionally declare the
schedulingConstraints
field,
which is interpreted by the
placement-based PodGroup scheduling algorithm
.
If constraints are defined in PodGroupTemplate, they will be copied to referencing PodGroups.
As of Kubernetes v1.36, the API supports topology constraints.
